WITH toDateTime64('2020-01-01 10:20:30.999999999', 9) AS dt64 SELECT toStartOfNanosecond(dt64);
WITH toDateTime64('2020-01-01 10:20:30.999999999', 9) AS dt64 SELECT toStartOfNanosecond(dt64, 'Europe/London');
WITH (SELECT toStartOfNanosecond(toDateTime64(event_time, 9)) FROM test_times) AS rounded_times SELECT rounded_times;
CREATE TABLE test_events (event_id Int32, event_time DateTime64(9));
SELECT event_id, toStartOfNanosecond(event_time) FROM test_events WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, toStartOfNanosecond(event_time) FROM test_events ORDER BY event_id DESC;
WITH (SELECT toStartOfNanosecond(toDateTime64('2020-01-02 11:30:45.999999999', 9))) AS rounded_time SELECT rounded_time, event_id FROM test_events;
WITH (SELECT event_id, toStartOfNanosecond(event_time) FROM test_events) AS results SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results;
WITH (SELECT toStartOfNanosecond(toDateTime64('2023-01-01 00:00:00.999999999', 9))) AS specific_time SELECT specific_time, event_id FROM test_events WHERE event_time >= specific_time;
